sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91792" key="purome/trhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῡρο-μέτρης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῡρο-μετρητής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n91792.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who measures wheat</tr_>, and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῡρο-μετρέω</orth>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">measure wheat</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
